login.heroSub: Accept payments, manage transactions and grow your business with Corenet Tech.
login.feature2Desc: Bank-grade security to keep your data safe.
login.feature3Desc: Real-time insights to help you make better business decisions.
login.title: Merchant Sign In

login.googleOAuthNoEmail: Google did not return an email address. Try another Google account.

login.googleOAuthInvalidCode: This sign-in link expired. Please use Sign in with Google again.

forgotPassword.brandSubtitle: Reset your password to regain access to your merchant account.
forgotPassword.requestSubtitle: Enter your email to reset your password.
forgotPassword.doneSubtitle: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now log in with your new password.
forgotPassword.toastCodeSent: A reset code has been sent to your email.
forgotPassword.toastSessionExpired: Session expired. Please request a new code.
forgotPassword.toastCodeVerified: Code verified. You can now reset your password.
forgotPassword.toastVerifyBeforeReset: Please verify the 6-digit code before resetting your password.
forgotPassword.toastMeetRequirements: Please meet all password requirements before proceeding.
forgotPassword.toastResetSuccess: Password reset successful. You can now log in.
forgotPassword.toastResendOk: A new code has been sent if the email exists.

resetFromEmail.invalidSubtitle: This link is invalid or expired. Please request a new password reset link.
resetFromEmail.setNewSubtitle: Enter your new password and confirmation.

accountVerification.passwordSubtitle: Create a secure password to complete your account setup and protect your account
accountVerification.codeIntroEmail: We've sent a verification code to your email address. Enter the code below to verify your account and proceed to password setup.
accountVerification.codeIntroPhone: We've sent a verification code to your phone number. Enter the code below to verify your account and proceed to password setup.
accountVerification.alertEmailLead: A verification code has been sent to your email:
accountVerification.alertEmailHint: Please check your inbox (and spam folder) and enter the code below.
accountVerification.alertPhoneLead: A verification code has been sent to your phone:
accountVerification.alertPhoneHint: Please check your SMS messages and enter the code below.
accountVerification.noTokenResend: No verification token found. Please resend the email code.
accountVerification.noSmsInProgress: No SMS verification in progress. Please resend the code.
accountVerification.verifyCodeError: There was an error verifying your code. Please try again.
accountVerification.failedSendCode: Failed to send verification code. Please try again.
accountVerification.registrationFailedGeneric: Failed to create account. Please try again.

firebase.sendFailed: Failed to send verification code. Please try again or select email verification instead.
firebase.invalidAppCredential: There was an error sending the message. Please try again or use email verification instead.
firebase.invalidPhone: The phone number format is invalid. Please check and try again.
firebase.tooManyRequests: Too many SMS requests. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
firebase.quotaExceeded: SMS quota exceeded. Please contact support or try again later.
firebase.captchaFailed: reCAPTCHA verification failed. Please refresh the page and try again.

merchant.submitted: Your merchant registration has been submitted successfully. Our team will review your application, and you will receive a confirmation email once it has been approved.
merchant.welcomeBody: You can start exploring our platform's features and interface right away! While some advanced features require admin approval, you have full access to navigate and discover our platform's capabilities. Once your account is approved, you'll receive a confirmation email and can login with your registered email and password to access all features.

partner.submitted: Your partner registration has been submitted successfully. Our team will review your application, and you will receive a confirmation email once it has been approved.
partner.welcomeBody: You can start exploring our platform's features and interface right away! While some advanced features require admin approval, you have full access to navigate and discover our platform's capabilities. Once your account is approved, you'll receive a confirmation email and can login with your registered email and password to access all features.
